summary: Comprehensive testing of MJ விண்வெளி அனுபவம் app - all backend APIs and frontend features verified working

issues: Time input defaults to 06:00 AM instead of empty/placeholder - minor UX issue

critical_code_review_comments: server.py is 350 lines - acceptable but growing; consider splitting seed data to separate file if more data is added
No rate limiting on /api/astrology/calculate endpoint - could be abused
CORS set to '*' via env default - should be restricted in production
seed_data_creation: None - existing MongoDB seed data used
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features verified: Hero (MJ branding + Tamil text), Navbar (6 Tamil links), Space section (Past 20/Present 15/Future 15 tabs), Astronomy Objects (16 cards + modal), Astrology Calculator (form fills + result with Rasi/Nakshatra/Lagna/Panchangam), Gallery (12 cards + modal). All 11 backend API tests pass. Backend data counts match requirements exactly.
